xqst corpse

A triptych performance of poetry, video, and dance with Althea Baird and mallika singh. For closing ceremony of the exhibition, Exquisite Corpse, co-hosted by Prrroblem Press.

  • Dec 14, 2025
  • Desert Mystery Centery, Albuquerque
  • performance
